sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101191" key="sunwroskope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνωροσκοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n101191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy the horoscope jointly</tr_>, of planets, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:60:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
